final_rules.instructions: This rule targets highly encoded versions of common XSS tags like
final_rules.refinement_notes: Optimized regex to `rx:<(?:script|iframe|svg|img)` for better performance and to accurately match decoded tags. Expanded to include `img` tag for broader coverage, specifically for payload 9. Added `t:urlDecodeUni,t:urlDecode,t:urlDecode,t:lowercase,t:compressWhiteSpace,t:removeNulls` transformations for robust decoding of full-width (`\uff05\uff12\uff15`) and double URL encoded (`%25`) payloads, as well as Unicode homoglyph normalization.
final_rules.rule: MainRule "rx:<(?:script|iframe|svg|img)" "msg:XSS: Encoded or Obfuscated script, iframe, svg, or img tag detected" "mz:BODY|URL|ARGS" "t:urlDecodeUni,t:urlDecode,t:urlDecode,t:lowercase,t:compressWhiteSpace,t:removeNulls" "s:$XSS:8" id:20001;

final_rules.instructions: This rule detects encoded JavaScript event handlers (e.g., onload, onclick, onerror) that trigger `alert()` or similar functions, indicating potential XSS. The comprehensive decoding stack ensures detection despite multi-layered encoding and Unicode homoglyphs.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Optimized `alert()` regex to `alert\([^)]*\)` to handle alert function calls with arguments (e.g., `alert(1)`). Expanded attribute value matching to `[^"']` to cover both double and single quotes. Applied `t:urlDecodeUni,t:urlDecode,t:urlDecode,t:lowercase,t:compressWhiteSpace,t:removeNulls` transformations for effective de-obfuscation.
final_rules.rule: MainRule "rx:on[a-z]+=[^"']*alert\([^)]*\)" "msg:XSS: Encoded inline event handler with alert detected" "mz:BODY|URL|ARGS" "t:urlDecodeUni,t:urlDecode,t:urlDecode,t:lowercase,t:compressWhiteSpace,t:removeNulls" "s:$XSS:8" id:20002;

final_rules.instructions: This rule targets JavaScript URI schemes (e.g., `javascript:alert(...)`), which are frequently used in XSS attacks. The added transformations ensure detection even when the scheme and payload are heavily obfuscated using full-width characters and multiple encodings.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Optimized `alert()` regex to `alert\([^)]*\)` to cover arguments. Expanded attribute value matching to `[^"']` to correctly match content after `javascript:` that might be enclosed in quotes. Applied `t:urlDecodeUni,t:urlDecode,t:urlDecode,t:lowercase,t:compressWhiteSpace,t:removeNulls` transformations for robust payload normalization.
final_rules.rule: MainRule "rx:javascript:[^"']*alert\([^)]*\)" "msg:XSS: JavaScript URI scheme detected with alert" "mz:BODY|URL|ARGS" "t:urlDecodeUni,t:urlDecode,t:urlDecode,t:lowercase,t:compressWhiteSpace,t:removeNulls" "s:$XSS:8" id:20003;

generated_rules.instructions: This rule targets highly encoded versions of tags like <script>, <iframe>, and <svg> which are common in XSS payloads, especially when combined with JavaScript functions.
generated_rules.rule: MainRule "rx:\\x25[0-9A-Fa-f]{2,3}\\/?script|\\x25[0-9A-Fa-f]{2,3}\\/?iframe|\\x25[0-9A-Fa-f]{2,3}\\/?svg" "msg:Encoded script, iframe, or svg tag detected" "mz:BODY|URL|ARGS" "s:$XSS:8" id:20001;

generated_rules.instructions: This rule detects encoded JavaScript event handlers like onload, onclick, etc., that are set to execute alert() or other functions, indicating potential XSS attempts.
generated_rules.rule: MainRule "rx:on[a-zA-Z]+=\\x22[^\\x22]*alert\\(\\)" "msg:Encoded inline event handler with alert detected" "mz:BODY|URL|ARGS" "s:$XSS:8" id:20002;

generated_rules.instructions: This rule targets JavaScript URI schemes which are frequently used to trigger XSS attacks, even when highly obfuscated.
generated_rules.rule: MainRule "rx:javascript\\:alert\\(\\)" "msg:JavaScript URI scheme detected with alert" "mz:BODY|URL|ARGS" "s:$XSS:8" id:20003;

generated_rules.instructions: Detects overuse of HTML entity encoding which suggests an attempt to obfuscate malicious payloads. This can catch excessive use of &#x encoding.
Looks for multiple consecutive Unicode encoding sequences. Highly encoded paths are typical for obfuscation tactics in web-based attacks.
generated_rules.rule: MainRule "rx:[a-zA-Z]{8,}\\x25[0-9A-Fa-f]{2}\\x25[0-9A-Fa-f]{2,3}" "msg:Potential Unicode obfuscation in script detected" "mz:BODY|URL|ARGS" "s:$XSS:8" id:20005;

generated_rules.instructions: Detects attempts to manipulate the DOM to include alert() functions, indicating XSS exploit attempts. This rule matches both encoded and decoded payloads.
generated_rules.rule: MainRule "rx:(?i)document.*(?:body|script|iframe).*alert\\(\\)" "msg:Document manipulation with alert detected" "mz:BODY|URL|ARGS" "s:$XSS:8" id:20006;
